narrative:
Union Township has 2,123 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.5 percentage points.
